label: Auto-Refund Activation
description: When auto-refunds are enabled, resolution rate jumps immediately and satisfaction gets a boost.

causal_translation.rule_text: Instant refunds improve customer experience — people love not waiting
causal_translation.shift_text: Customers get faster resolution, satisfaction improves
causal_translation.effect_text: Customer satisfaction increases by the profile's satisfaction boost per step

label: Refund Volume Growth
description: Easy refunds attract more refund requests. The easier the process, the more people use it.

causal_translation.trigger_text: Auto-refunds are processing without human review
causal_translation.rule_text: Low-friction refunds increase total refund volume — both legitimate and opportunistic
causal_translation.shift_text: More customers request refunds because the barrier is gone
causal_translation.effect_text: Refund rate grows by the profile's growth factor each step

label: Abuse Rate Escalation
description: When refunds are automated, bad actors learn the system is exploitable. Abuse grows exponentially.

causal_translation.trigger_text: More than 30% of refunds are auto-resolved without human oversight
causal_translation.rule_text: Automated systems without oversight are exploitable — bad actors find and share the loophole
causal_translation.shift_text: Word spreads that refunds are rubber-stamped. Abuse accelerates.
causal_translation.effect_text: Abuse rate multiplies by the profile's abuse growth factor each step

label: Trust Erosion from Abuse
description: When abuse is visible (high abuse rate), legitimate customers lose faith in the system's fairness.

causal_translation.trigger_text: Abuse rate crosses the trust erosion threshold
causal_translation.rule_text: When customers see others gaming the system, they question whether the company is in control
causal_translation.shift_text: Social proof of abuse undermines trust in the refund process
causal_translation.effect_text: Trust score drops by 10% each step abuse remains above threshold

label: Satisfaction Decay from Distrust
description: When trust falls, satisfaction follows. People don't like doing business with companies they don't trust.

causal_translation.rule_text: Low trust poisons the entire customer relationship — not just refunds
causal_translation.shift_text: Customers become skeptical of all interactions, not just refund-related ones
causal_translation.effect_text: Customer satisfaction decays by 8% per step while trust is low

label: Escalation Spike
description: Distrust drives customers to demand human agents, overwhelming the escalation queue.

causal_translation.rule_text: Customers who don't trust the AI refuse to use it — they escalate to humans
causal_translation.shift_text: The automation that was supposed to save costs now generates MORE human work
causal_translation.effect_text: Escalation rate increases by the profile's distrust escalation factor each step

label: Revenue Margin Erosion
description: High refund rates directly erode revenue. Every auto-approved refund is money out the door.

causal_translation.trigger_text: Refund rate exceeds the revenue collapse threshold
causal_translation.rule_text: Refunds are a direct cost — high refund volume eats margin regardless of whether they're legitimate
causal_translation.shift_text: The CFO starts asking questions about the auto-refund experiment
causal_translation.effect_text: Revenue margin shrinks by the margin erosion factor each step

label: Abuse-Refund Cascade
description: High abuse rates cause even more refund requests as the system loses credibility and people pile on.

causal_translation.trigger_text: Abuse rate crosses the cascade threshold — system is being actively gamed
causal_translation.rule_text: Abuse begets abuse. Once a system is known to be exploitable, exploitation accelerates.
causal_translation.shift_text: The refund system enters a doom loop: abuse → more refunds → more abuse
causal_translation.effect_text: Refund rate jumps 20% and auto-resolve volume increases 10% as the system struggles

label: Trust Recovery
description: When abuse is under control, trust slowly recovers as customers see the system working fairly.

causal_translation.trigger_text: Abuse is below the trust erosion threshold and trust hasn't fully recovered
causal_translation.rule_text: Trust recovers slowly when the system demonstrates fairness consistently
causal_translation.shift_text: Customers start to believe the system works again
causal_translation.effect_text: Trust recovers at the profile's recovery rate — but much slower than it was lost

label: System Collapse
description: When revenue margin, trust, and satisfaction all crater simultaneously, the system is unsalvageable.

causal_translation.trigger_text: Revenue margin below 25% AND trust below 30 — the system is in freefall
causal_translation.rule_text: When both financial viability and customer trust are gone, there is nothing left to save
causal_translation.shift_text: Auto-refunds are emergency disabled. Damage control begins.
causal_translation.effect_text: Satisfaction halves. Auto-resolve is shut off. If margin hits 15%, the model collapses entirely.
